name: Peanut Brittle
recipeInstructions: Combine peanuts, sugar, corn syrup, and salt in a Dutch oven. Cook over low heat, stirring gently, until sugar dissolves. Cover and cook over medium heat for 2 to 3 minutes to wash down sugar crystals from the sides of the pan. Uncover and cook, stirring occasionally, until it reaches the hard crack stage (300°F). Stir in butter, baking soda, and vanilla. Pour into a buttered 15 x 10 x 1-inch jellyroll pan, spreading thinly. Let cool. Break into pieces. Yield: about 1 pound.
